name: react-design-philosophy
description: React design philosophy for abstraction design, hook review, and hook writing. Covers declarative APIs, lifecycle safety, SSR, state design, effect patterns, TypeScript, and performance.

interface.shortDescription: React hook design, review, and API abstraction guidance.
interface.longDescription: React design philosophy for abstraction design, hook review, and hook writing. Covers declarative APIs, lifecycle safety, SSR, state design, effect patterns, TypeScript, and performance.
defaultPrompt: Review this hook against React design principles.
Design a React hook API for this behavior.
Check whether this abstraction fits React.
